description_long: This is a modern bungalow residence set within a fenced lot, featuring a combination of flat and gable roof sections. The front facade includes a driveway leading to a covered carport, flanked by manicured shrubs and a prominent entryway. Large floor-to-ceiling windows are visible on one side, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard boasts a swimming pool surrounded by palm trees, a shaded lounge area with sunbeds, and a small outbuilding or pool house. The property is bordered by a white fence and includes a paved walkway and green lawn areas. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and contemporary architectural lines.
description: A modern bungalow with a mix of flat and gable roofs, large windows, a carport, and a backyard pool with palm trees and lounge areas, all enclosed by a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, and large windows on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat-roofed section, carport, and the pool area with palm trees in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the swimming pool, shaded lounge area, and palm trees, with the back of the bungalow visible.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing the pool, lounge area, and the transition between the gable and flat roof sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows on one side
